_design_notes.tiers: Strict | Standard | Minimal (per Plan 81 SP03 spec §Frontmatter schema, L27-46)
_design_notes.consumer: pre-write-guard.sh case statement; loaded at runtime
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep — schema + hook + docs updated in one commit
source_decisions: Plan 81 SP03 spec L27-46 (3 compliance tiers; unified-with-per-archetype-entries model)
D1 resolution 2026-05-11 (folder-lineage convention; engagement+project retired from TYPE allowlist, retained as FIELD slots)
D2 resolution 2026-05-11 (system-utility dimension exemption: #log/* and #status/* exempt from 25-cap; bound to log-subtype-registry T-34)
downstream_consumers: T-17 archetype templates (4 archetypes; R-32 100% conformant)
T-24 frontmatter-rules.json (rule-level peer; binds R-32 Tier 2 DENY to this schema)

strict.description: System files (scaffold-emitted by SP04, /ingest-routed by SP05, scraper-aggregated to Inbox/). Hard fail at write-time (R-32 Tier 2 DENY).
strict.applies_to: type entries with tier=strict in this schema

standard.description: User-authored vault content. Soft warning; librarian flags drift via tag-coverage-audit + frontmatter-coverage-audit capabilities.
standard.applies_to: type entries with tier=standard in this schema

minimal.description: Explicit opt-out files. No validation; flagged 'outside system' by librarian. Used for legacy imports, paste-buffer scratch, archives outside lifecycle.
minimal.applies_to: files matching _minimal_tier_exemptions glob patterns OR carrying explicit `tier: minimal` frontmatter directive

_archetype_conditional_fields._description: Fields that may appear in any type entry's required/optional list. Per-type entries declare which apply (the 'per-archetype entries' in the unified model). Adopters extend this list via Layer 3 vault-overlay; the 13 entries below are the foundation-repo seed (Peter's empirical instantiation generalized for adopter consumption).

_packet_only_fields._description: Fields valid only on entries with type=packet (system-altitude research context packets at `claude-stem/research/vault-construction/`). Engagement/topic/initiative altitude packets at the user vault use the same shape via the `packet` type entry below.

parent_plan.reason: Plan-tree-only field; lives in `plans-schema.json`, not vault schema.
parent_plan.disposition: Deferred from v1. Re-visit when planning methodology generalizes for adopters (per spec L43).
parent_plan.do_not: Do NOT add `parent_plan` to any vault-schema type entry. Plan-tree files live under `~/.claude-plans/` and validate against plans-schema.json.

engagement.reason: Type information lives at file level only — folders don't have frontmatter. `engagement` is NOT a canonical TYPE; it is a FIELD slot that propagates folder lineage to files. Folders own structural artifact; field + tag propagate to file level.
engagement.replacement: Use `engagement: <slug>` as FIELD on any file living under `Engagements/<X>/Projects/<Y>/` (see _path_rules.consultant-engagement-project-lineage). For the engagement-level navigation file itself (e.g., `Engagements/<X>/CLAUDE.md`), use type=`navigation`.

project.reason: Same as `engagement` — folders own project lineage; FIELD `project` propagates lineage to files.
project.replacement: Use `project: <slug>` as FIELD on any file living under `Engagements/<X>/Projects/<Y>/` (see _path_rules.consultant-engagement-project-lineage). For the project-level overview file itself, use type=`context` or type=`navigation` (per file purpose).

_path_rules._description: Cross-cutting folder-lineage validation rules. Hook contract: when a file is written, evaluate matching path rules; if pattern matches, the file MUST satisfy the requires_fields + requires_tags clauses. Encoded generically so adopter archetypes (researcher's Topics/<X>/Studies/<Y>/; developer's Repos/<X>/Epics/<Y>/) extend the array without schema-shape changes. Foundation-repo ships with the consultant default. Hook contract authored by T-20; rule ID assigned by SP01 at lockstep; implementation by SP05.

rules.rule_id_ref: R-NEW (assigned by SP01 at R-37 lockstep)
rules.rationale: Folder-lineage frontmatter convention (D1 resolution, 2026-05-11). Folder is structural artifact; frontmatter fields + tags are file-level workaround that propagates lineage to every file. R-32 hook contract (T-20) validates lineage consistency at write-time.
exemptions: Files at Engagements/<X>/CLAUDE.md (engagement-level navigation; type=navigation entry handles)
Files at Engagements/<X>/_index.md (folder index; type=index entry handles)
Files at Engagements/<X>/Projects/<Y>/CLAUDE.md (project-level navigation; type=navigation entry handles)
Files at Engagements/<X>/Projects/<Y>/_index.md (project folder index; type=index entry handles)

_tag_prefixes_meta._description: Eight-dimension faceted taxonomy (Plan 81 SP03 spec §Tagging spec L47-91). Adopters extend via Layer 3 vault-overlay using per-archetype synonym dictionaries (T-16). System-utility dimensions (#log/*, #status/*) exempt from 25-tag cap per D2; bound to log-subtype-registry (T-34) discipline instead.

packet._description: Research context packets at all four altitudes (system / engagement / topic / initiative). System-altitude packets canonical at `claude-stem/research/vault-construction/`; engagement/topic/initiative at user vault. Surfaces 180-day `last_reviewed` cadence (system) / 90-day (topic) / continuous (engagement) / closed-at-plan-close (initiative).

archetype-template._description: Scaffold templates at `claude-stem/onboarding/templates/<archetype>/` consumed by SP04 install. Pre-populated frontmatter; R-32 100% conformant per T-17 AC. Anti-drift principle: archetype templates ship pre-populated UPFRONT; user-added files inherit defaults via templates.
